features: Partition design: Our wine bottle bag has 6 compartments, making it the ultimate must-have for wine enthusiasts on the go. The size of each compartment is very suitable for accommodating wine, champagne, olive oil, and other beverages.

High quality materials: The material is made of high-quality non-woven fabric, which is both waterproof and tear resistant. With its exquisite hand sewn finish, it can be reused for a long time. In addition, it is easy to clean as it can be directly washed and air dried in the sink for later use.

Suitable size: Our wine bottle gift bag measures approximately 31 x 25 x 18 centimeters, compact and spacious. It has partitions inside to keep the bottles organized and tidy, while providing you with a comfortable carrying experience.

Travel wine bottle bag: Our bottle bag comes with a convenient handle, making it perfect for outdoor picnics, parties, or travel. For wine enthusiasts who want to enjoy their favorite wines anytime, anywhere, this is a convenient choice.

Widely used: Our bottle bags can not only serve as storage solutions for wine bottles, but also be used to hold other beverages such as champagne, spirits, and even soft drinks. They are also convenient for shopping, fishing, camping, and traveling, and are very fashionable. This is an ideal gift for any wine enthusiast.
